Title: Inventory not decremented when order is placed
Description: Product inventory counts are not being reduced when customers place orders. Warehouse physical counts don't match system counts. Customers can order items that are actually out of stock.

Title: Customers able to apply same coupon code multiple times
Description: Applying the same coupon code repeatedly on the checkout page stacks the discount. Each application increases the discount amount. Checkout display total differs from actual charged amount.

Title: Order total off by a penny on some orders
Description: On certain orders the total doesn't exactly match subtotal + tax + shipping. Discrepancy is 1-2 cents. Depends on specific dollar amounts involved.

Title: Cancelled orders don't restore inventory
Description: When an order is cancelled (by customer or admin) the inventory for those products is not added back. Leads to phantom out-of-stock situations.

Title: Product search returns server error on special characters
Description: Searching for terms with apostrophes or special characters causes 500 error. Potential injection risk flagged by security consultant.

Title: Cart still shows items after completing checkout
Description: After placing an order the cart retains all items. Cart persists on page refresh. Customers can accidentally create duplicate orders.

Title: Product ratings seem wrong on product detail pages
Description: Average rating on product pages doesn't match actual average of all reviews. Discrepancy increases with number of reviews. Products with many reviews show inaccurate ratings.

Title: Order status jumps skipping required steps
Description: Multiple warehouse users can simultaneously update order status causing out-of-sequence transitions. Orders can go from processing to delivered skipping shipped.

Title: Last page of products not accessible
Description: Pagination shows fewer pages than needed. When total products don't divide evenly by page size the last partial page is inaccessible. Some products are unreachable through browsing.

Title: Expired coupon codes still being accepted
Description: Coupons continue working for several hours past their expiration date. Undermines time-limited promotions.

Title: Remove old homepage hero section behind SALE_BANNER flag
Description: SALE_BANNER feature flag permanently enabled. Old hero section and HeroBannerClassic component are dead code behind the else branch.

Title: Clean up PRODUCT_RECOMMENDATIONS feature flag dead code
Description: PRODUCT_RECOMMENDATIONS flag permanently enabled. Dead else branch with getRandomProducts function never executes.

Title: Clean up INVENTORY_ALERTS feature flag dead code
Description: INVENTORY_ALERTS flag permanently enabled. Dead else branch in product detail page never executes.

Title: Remove unused legacy integration functions
Description: legacy.ts contains exported functions for ShipStation Shopify Mailchimp QuickBooks integrations that were never shipped. Functions are imported in one file but never called.

Title: Remove orphaned /api/v1/products endpoint
Description: Duplicate products API at /api/v1/products returns different response shape. Nothing in the frontend uses it. Leftover from abandoned API redesign.

Title: Remove orphaned OldCheckoutForm and ProductQuickView components
Description: Two fully-built components that are never rendered. OldCheckoutForm is the old multi-step checkout. ProductQuickView is an unfinished modal feature. Unused import exists in products page.

Title: Allow guest checkout without account creation
Description: 34% cart abandonment at login wall. GUEST_CHECKOUT flag exists but nothing is wired up. Need full guest checkout flow without account requirement.

Title: Implement wishlist / save for later
Description: 23 customer requests for save-for-later functionality. WISHLIST flag exists but feature not implemented. No database table API or UI.

Title: Public order tracking page
Description: Customers need self-service order tracking at /track with order number and email lookup. Currently 30% of support tickets are order status inquiries.

Title: Multiple product images with gallery view
Description: Products limited to single image. Need multi-image support with thumbnail carousel on product detail page. 18% return rate partly due to insufficient product photography.

Title: Bulk inventory update via CSV upload
Description: Warehouse staff need CSV upload in admin to update inventory counts in bulk. Currently takes 1+ hour to update 50 SKUs one by one.

Title: Order email notifications
Description: No transactional emails sent. Need order confirmation shipping notification and delivery confirmation emails. Generates ~20 support tickets per week.
